notableEvents.label: Luis Arraez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Luis Arraez grounds into a double play, second baseman Brice Turang to shortstop David Hamilton to first baseman Andrew Vaughn. Rafael Devers out at 2nd. Luis Arraez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Drew Gilbert pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Drew Gilbert flies out to center fielder Jackson Chourio.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Vaughn singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee. Brice Turang scores. William Contreras scores. Jake Bauers to 3rd. Andrew Vaughn to 2nd. Andrew Vaughn advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by right fielder Jung Hoo Lee.
